name: UTF-16 to UTF-8
summary: Zero-dependency streaming conversion from UTF-16 byte streams to UTF-8.

scope: Unicode scalar values represented by valid UTF-16
out_of_scope: Charset detection beyond BOM and configured byte order

guarantees: Every emitted scalar equals the decoded input scalar
tradeoffs: Conversion stops at the first malformed sequence

guarantees: Malformed sequences are represented by U+FFFD and counted
tradeoffs: Malformed source code units are not recoverable

properties: Valid UTF-16 decodes to the same Unicode scalar sequence as Rust char encoding
regression: Single-byte Read chunks preserve code-unit boundaries
fuzz: Planned: arbitrary byte streams and reader chunk boundaries
benchmarks: Planned: ASCII-heavy, BMP-heavy and supplementary-plane corpora

limits: buffer_size is constrained to 2 bytes through 16 MiB
output growth is bounded by decoded scalar encoding
known_risks: I/O errors may occur after partial output has been written
